description: Program-memory v3 harvest manifest for one program review bundle.

required_fields.name: review_stage
required_fields.description: Current review stage for the bundle.

required_fields.name: corpus_tier
required_fields.description: Tiered scope bucket for the program.

required_fields.name: materialized_at
required_fields.description: Date the harvest bundle was materialized.

required_fields.name: seed_mode
required_fields.description: Whether the bundle was bootstrapped via explicit seed mode instead of the curated pilot registry.

required_fields.name: source_document_count
required_fields.description: Declared count of source documents in the manifest.

required_fields.name: source_documents
required_fields.description: Per-source metadata rows linked to the program, including immutable capture fields such as captured_at, raw_artifact_path, content_sha256, source_version, and content_type.
